framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM destroyed 2/3 arms manufacturing
history.note: Day 28 21:00. CENTCOM chief: destroyed 2/3 of Iran arms manufacturing (ToI Mar 25). CENTCOM struck 9th Artesh Air Force Tactical Airbase Bandar Abbas Mar 25 (ISW). AJE live tracker: 1,937 killed + 24,800 injured Iran total. 6 US crew killed in refueling crash Iraq Mar 13. Fire STILL 1-2 at a time (Cooper confirmed). ISW: 85% SAMs destroyed. Combined force struck Abu Musa Island ports. US dead: 14 confirmed KIA (Wikipedia) + 6 crash + 1 health = 21. PATTERN: IRGC volume collapse accelerating — arms manufacturing destruction removes regeneration capacity. Residual precision strikes (Jerusalem/Tel Aviv/Gulf) = demonstrating political will not military capability. Source: ToI/ISW/AJE/CENTCOM/Wikipedia

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM destroyed 2/3 arms mfg, Israel killed IRGC Navy commander

history.est: 1-2 declining, IRGC claims 220 'coordinated' but volume still collapsed
history.note: Day 29. ★★★★★ BREAKING: Trump EXTENDED energy infrastructure strike deadline 10 DAYS to April 6 8PM ET — 'per Iranian Government request' (NPR/CNBC/Bloomberg/CBS/NYT/Guardian). IRGC claims 220 'coordinated' attacks with regional allies (IRNA/Express Tribune) but fire STILL 1-2 at a time (Cooper confirmed). CENTCOM: 9000+ targets struck, 140+ vessels destroyed, 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed. IDF: 600+ ballistic sites struck. ISW: 85% SAMs gone. ISW: CENTCOM struck 9th Artesh AF Tactical AB Bandar Abbas. Combined force struck Abu Musa Island. Israel killed IRGC Navy commander who ordered Hormuz closure (Fox). US dead: 21 total (14 KIA + 6 crash + 1 health), 290+ wounded. Iran dead: 1937 killed + 24800 injured (AJE tracker). 13 US bases nearly uninhabitable (NYT). 82nd Airborne 2-3K deploying. Senate blocked War Powers 53-47. S&P 500 -1.72% to 6478 on Mar 26. PATTERN: IRGC 220 coordinated attacks = LABEL not VOLUME — physical fire rate UNCHANGED at 1-2. Trump 10-day extension = MAJOR DE-ESCALATION window. Source: NPR/CNBC/Bloomberg/CBS/NYT/Guardian/IRNA/ExpressTribune/CENTCOM/ISW/AJE/Fox

history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 10000+ targets, mass salvo era OVER

Atlantic: 'massively asymmetrical war' — CENTCOM planning F-16/F-18 to clear remaining attack craft + minesweeping for strait. US dead: 21 total (13 KIA + 1 health + 6 crash), 290 wounded. Iran dead: 1,937 killed + 24,800 injured (AJE). Murkowski (R) drafting AUMF to force Congress vote. Trump approval 36% new low (Reuters/Ipsos). history.est: 1-2 declining, CENTCOM 10000+ targets, IDF sweeping EAST to Mashhad, IRGC Navy commander killed

history.est: 1-2 declining, Prince Sultan AB hit (12 US injured), Arak+Bushehr nuclear sites struck
history.note: Day 32. ★★★★★ NUCLEAR ESCALATION + BASE BREACH: (1) IDF confirmed bombing Iran Arak heavy water reactor — 'key plutonium infrastructure' (ToI Mar 27); (2) Bushehr nuclear plant struck THIRD TIME Friday night (CNN); (3) 12 US troops injured at Prince Sultan Air Base Saudi Arabia, 2 SERIOUSLY (NYT) — most serious breach since war began; (4) 1 killed Tel Aviv from Iran missile Mar 28 (JPost); (5) Iran struck Gulf energy sites (Saudi/Qatar/Kuwait/UAE) after Israel struck South Pars gas field (AJE); (6) Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 of Iran missile arsenal destroyed (not 85%); (7) CENTCOM 10,000+ targets, 2/3 arms manufacturing destroyed; (8) ToI: US acknowledges war may extend past 4-6 week timeline; (9) Rubio at G7: expects operation 'weeks not months'; (10) Witkoff: negotiations 'this week'. IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time but NUCLEAR TARGET ESCALATION by IDF + BASE BREACH at Prince Sultan = new escalatory dimension. Source: ToI/CNN/NYT/JPost/AJE/Reuters/AP/CNBC

history.est: 1-2 declining, Houthis joined war, Prince Sultan AB breach, Arak+Bushehr nukes struck

IDF struck Arak heavy water reactor 'key plutonium infrastructure' (ToI Mar 27) + Bushehr 3rd time (CNN). 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi, 2 SERIOUSLY (NYT) — most serious base breach. 1 killed Tel Aviv from Iran missile Mar 28 (JPost). US dead: 21 total (13 KIA + 1 health + 6 crash). NYT: at least 16 killed in Iranian attacks on Israel; 50+ killed in Gulf countries. Source: Wikipedia/NYT/ISW/CNN/ToI/Fox/JPost/Reuters/AJE

history.est: 1-2 declining, Prince Sultan AB hit (12 injured), Houthis launched first missile at Israel, Arak+Bushehr nukes struck
history.note: Day 32. ★★★★★ HOUTHIS FORMALLY ENTERED WAR Mar 28 — barrage of ballistic missiles toward Israel from Yemen (CNN/NYT/Reuters/AJE/AP). First Houthi attack on Israel since war began. IDF struck Arak heavy water reactor (ToI) + Bushehr 3rd time (CNN). 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi, 2 seriously (NYT). 1 killed Tel Aviv from Iran missile Mar 28 (JPost). CENTCOM 10,000+ targets, 2/3 arms mfg destroyed. IDF killed IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri. IRGC recruitment age lowered to 12 (ISW). Reuters: US can only confirm ~1/3 missile arsenal destroyed. IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over but GEOGRAPHIC+ACTOR EXPANSION: Houthis = INDEPENDENT capability node. Rubio at G7: weeks not months. Witkoff: negotiations this week. In-person talks possibly starting in Pakistan/Turkey. Source: CNN/NYT/Reuters/AP/AJE/ToI/ISW/JPost

history.est: 1-2 declining, Houthis entered war (INDEPENDENT), CENTCOM blocking underground tunnel access, Kuwait airport radar struck
history.note: Day 33. ★★★★★ HOUTHIS FORMALLY AT WAR — barrage of ballistic missiles at Israel from Yemen (NYT/Reuters/CNN/AJE/Guardian Mar 28). CENTCOM published footage Mar 27: struck bulldozers/loaders Iran used to try to clear debris and reopen tunnel entrances to underground missile facilities (ISW). Iran targeted 'Ukrainian anti-drone system depot' in Dubai UAE (Iran state TV). Drones struck Kuwait airport radar + Salalah port Oman. 12 US troops injured Prince Sultan AB Saudi, 2 seriously (NYT). Bushehr nuclear plant struck 3rd time overnight (AEOI confirmed, no material damage). IRGC fire STILL 1-2 at a time — mass salvo era CONFIRMED over. BUT: Houthis = INDEPENDENT capability node, NOT inheriting IRGC degradation. USS Gerald R. Ford docked Croatia for repairs + liberty (6th Fleet). PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed + underground access denied, BUT new actor (Houthis) + geographic expansion (UAE/Oman/Kuwait). Source: ISW/NYT/Reuters/CNN/AJE/Guardian/CBS/AEOI

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis ENTERED war 2 salvos, Hezbollah 600+ attacks/24h DOUBLING peak

PATTERN: IRGC volume collapsed BUT 2 INDEPENDENT fronts activated — Houthis + Hezbollah surge. Each must be assessed as INDEPENDENT capability node, NOT inheriting IRGC degradation. Source: Reuters/CNN/NYT/AJE/JPost/ISW/LA Times/Wikipedia

history.est: 1-2 declining (IRGC), Houthis 2ND WAVE cruise+drones at Israel, Iran new wave missiles Sunday
history.note: Day 34 PM. ★★★★★ MULTI-FRONT SUSTAINED: (1) Houthis SECOND WAVE — cruise missiles + drones at Israel targeting military sites (NYT/Guardian/HindustanTimes). Confirms INDEPENDENT SUSTAINED capability, not one-off; (2) Iran fired NEW WAVE of missiles at Israel on Sunday (The Hindu); (3) IRGC attacked aluminium smelters in Bahrain (ALBA, 2 wounded) + UAE (EGA) — ECONOMIC INFRASTRUCTURE targeting = NEW escalation dimension (AJE); (4) UAE air defenses ACTIVELY ENGAGING missiles+drones, sounds across country; (5) Kuwait intercepting attacks early Sunday; (6) Saudi intercepted 10 drones; (7) IRGC threatened US university campuses in Gulf (NYU Abu Dhabi, Texas A&M Qatar); (8) US/Israeli strikes hit Iran port city near Hormuz (ArabNews); (9) Iran found 120+ unexploded cluster bombs in southern province; (10) IDF soldier killed in southern Lebanon; (11) US Marines arriving in region; (12) Pentagon considering 10,000 MORE ground troops (WSJ) on top of 7,000 already en route = potential 17K ground force. IRGC volume STILL 1-2 at a time but Houthis 2nd wave + economic targeting + Gulf-wide strikes = WAR WIDENING across all dimensions. Source: NYT/Guardian/AJE/HindustanTimes/CBS/ArabNews/TheHindu/Reuters

Our missiles are in place. Waiting for US troops on ground'; (7) 2,500 US Marines ARRIVED in region (AP Mar 29); (8) Pentagon considering 10,000 MORE ground troops (WSJ); (9) US KIA: 15 confirmed + 332 wounded (Wikipedia); (10) Iran: 2,076 killed + 26,500 injured (Health Ministry); HRANA: 3,461 killed; Hengaw: 6,900 killed. history.est: ~2.5-3 mbd (5-6 ships/day, two-tier regime solidifying)
history.note: Day 28 21:00. BBC: ~100 ships since Mar 1. Windward Mar 22: 16 AIS-visible in 7 days = near collapse, BUT Kpler: 138 ships in March = 5-6/day (improvement). Iran told UN/IMO: 'non-hostile' vessels may transit if coordinated (Reuters Mar 24). Lloyd's List: 20+ vessels via Larak Island route, ~$2M fee each. Saudi/UAE bypassing via pipelines (East-West to Yanbu, ADCOP to Fujairah). India/Pakistan sent destroyers to Gulf of Oman escort. TWO-TIER regime solidifying: 5 friendly nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) get passage, US/Israel/Gulf allies BLOCKED. PATTERN: Physical transit improving slightly (2.3→5-6/day) as Iran monetizes access. Still 95% below pre-crisis (17-20 mbd). Source: BBC/Windward/Kpler/Reuters/Lloyd's List

TWO-TIER TRANSIT solidifying + DIPLOMATIC TRANSIT SIGNAL via tanker 'present'. Uptick from ~2.5 to ~3-4 mbd est. Source: Fox/CSMonitor/SCMP/Kpler/Lloyd's/India Today

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.status: VERBAL_MEDIATION + MATERIAL_SUPPORT — China ABSENT from Pakistan Quad, no paradigm shift
fp1_china_action.findings: Day 35. China NOT present at Pakistan Quad talks (SA/Turkey/Egypt/Pakistan only). Asia Times Mar 26: China 'mediator' pressuring Iran to reopen Hormuz. 5 friendly nations (CN/IN/RU/PK/IQ) still get passage. Iran blocked 2 Chinese ships Mar 27 — friction persists. No naval deployment, no security guarantee, no ceasefire proposal from Beijing. fp1 threshold NOT met. Source: AP/Reuters/Asia Times

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.status: CONTRADICTION AT ALL-TIME PEAK — Pakistan Quad talks OPENED + 2500 Marines ARRIVED + Pentagon 10K more troops + Iran refuses direct talks
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: Day 35. ★★★★★ fp2 AT ALL-TIME PEAK: (1) Pakistan Quad talks OPENED Sunday — SA/Turkey/Egypt FMs in Islamabad (AP/Reuters confirmed); (2) Analyst: Pakistan mediation gaining credible regional backing; (3) BUT 2,500 US Marines ARRIVED in region (AP); (4) Pentagon considering 10,000 MORE ground troops (WSJ) = potential 17K ground force; (5) Iran parliament speaker: 'waiting for arrival of American troops on ground to set them on fire'; (6) Iran backs Pakistan mediation but INSISTS halt to strikes BEFORE any talks (AsianMirror/CNN-News18); (7) Iran rejects direct US talks, calls Trump 'deceitful' (Wikipedia); (8) IDF struck 4 Tehran locations Saturday (Fars); (9) UAE intercepted 16 missiles + 42 drones in 24h; (10) Murkowski drafting AUMF to force Congress vote on authorization. ASSESSMENT: Two tracks at MAX DIVERGENCE — multilateral diplomacy framework + largest military escalation since war began running in parallel. Source: AP/Reuters/WSJ/Fars/AsianMirror/NYT

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.status: PAKISTAN QUAD TALKS DAY 1 — SA+Turkey+Egypt FMs in Islamabad, Iran allows 20 Pakistan ships as trust signal, Apr 6 deadline 8 days
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: Day 35. ★★★★★ fp3 MOST ACTIVE EVER: (1) Pakistan Quad talks OPENED today — SA FM Prince Faisal, Turkey FM Fidan, Egypt FM Abdelatty in Islamabad (AP/PTV confirmed); (2) Pakistan PM Sharif pledged support to Saudi + briefed on mediation (AP); (3) Iran allowing 20 Pakistan-flagged ships (2/day) through Hormuz = TRUST SIGNAL for mediation (AlArabiya); (4) Iran PM Pezeshkian had 'extensive discussions' with Sharif Saturday night; (5) BUT Iran INSISTS: no cessation of hostilities → no negotiations (AsianMirror); (6) Murkowski (R) drafting AUMF = new Congressional constraint pathway (NYT Mar 26); (7) Senate rejected War Powers 53-47 last week (TheHill); (8) Apr 6 energy infrastructure strike deadline = 8 DAYS. ASSESSMENT: Most concrete multilateral framework yet but massive contradictions — military escalation DURING talks. ~35-40% ceasefire framework within 2 weeks (DOWN from 40-45% due to Iran preconditions + multi-front expansion). Source: AP/PTV/AlArabiya/AsianMirror/NYT/TheHill

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: Day 35. ★★★★★ fp4 CONTINUING TO WIDEN: (1) VIX 31.05 (+13.16%) — elevated fear (Yahoo Finance Mar 28); (2) Gold ,524.30 (+2.62%) — safe haven surge; (3) S&P 500: 5th straight losing week, -1.67% Friday; (4) Dow: 45,167 (-793), ENTERED CORRECTION (-10% from peak); (5) Brent ~ HIGHEST since 2022, WTI touched ; (6) Gas: .98/gal national, LA .97 — approaching  psychological barrier; (7) US KIA: 15 confirmed, 332 wounded; (8) Trump approval 36% new low (Reuters/Ipsos); (9) Iranians crossing to Iraq for cheaper groceries + internet (AP Mar 29); (10) Iran: 2,076-6,900 killed (range across sources); (11) Qalibaf rhetoric: 'waiting for US troops on ground' = signaling readiness for ground war. ASSESSMENT: Every cost dimension breaching simultaneously — financial/political/human. Political sustainability window NARROWING fast, especially with Dow in correction + gas near  + 36% approval. Source: Yahoo Finance/CNN/Investopedia/AP/Reuters

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
